meta.title: Carlos Armando Guerra — Industrial Control Electronic Engineer
meta.description: 30+ years optimizing industrial production lines. Thermoforming, BOPP, metallization, PP extrusion, energy efficiency.

brands.title: Industrial brands with proven hands-on experience
brands.desc: Operation, maintenance, troubleshooting and commissioning across lines and systems from the world's leading manufacturers.

projects.title: Representative technical intervention cases

results.title: Measurable impact on the plant
results.desc: Every intervention targets one or more hard business indicators: cost, time, quality and availability.

testimonials.title: Feedback from those who run the line
